headline: Nasdaq Halts Happy City Holdings Ltd
summary: NEW YORK, June 29, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- The Nasdaq Stock Market® (Nasdaq: NDAQ) announced that trading is halted in Happy City Holdings Ltd (Nasdaq: HCHL) for additional information requested from the company. Previously, the Securities and Exchange Commission effected a trading suspension in HCHL from 04:00:00 on June 12, 2026 to 23:59:00 on June 29, 2026. The last sale price of the company’s shares was $3.96. More information about the SEC’s order can be found at https://www.sec.gov/files/
